grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Response thoroughly covers all five areas: governance/accountability, risk management, information security/cyber awareness, training/competency, client care/complaints, and file/case management

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Response provides detailed evidence lists including training certificates, complaints register, SRO documentation, undertakings register, audit logs, and many other specific evidence types

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Response explicitly mentions the SRO role and need for documentation naming the SRO and their specific responsibilities

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Response specifically states need for 'written procedures showing how the firm adopts and monitors the Law Society Protocol' and mentions regular compliance reviews

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Response has dedicated section on Information Security and Cyber Awareness, covering cyber security policy, fraud training, secure communications, and bank detail verification procedures

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Response includes dedicated File and Case Management section covering file reviews, undertakings register, internal file audits, and standardized checklists
